title: Register with valid email format
description: Verify that registration succeeds when a valid email conforming to simplified RFC 5322 is provided.

title: Register with invalid email format
description: Verify that registration is rejected with error message 'Địa chỉ email không đúng định dạng. Vui lòng kiểm tra lại.' when email format is invalid.

title: Register with disposable email provider
description: Verify that registration is rejected when email domain is from a known disposable email provider.

title: Register with duplicate email
description: Verify that registration is rejected with error message 'Email này đã được đăng ký. Vui lòng đăng nhập hoặc sử dụng email khác.' when email already exists.

title: Register with password length exactly 8 characters
description: Verify that registration succeeds when password is exactly 8 characters and meets all complexity rules.

title: Register with password length exactly 64 characters
description: Verify that registration succeeds when password is exactly 64 characters and meets all complexity rules.

title: Register with password length 7 characters
description: Verify that registration is rejected with error message 'Mật khẩu phải có độ dài từ 8 đến 64 ký tự.' when password is 7 characters.

title: Register with password length 65 characters
description: Verify that registration is rejected with error message 'Mật khẩu phải có độ dài từ 8 đến 64 ký tự.' when password is 65 characters.

title: Register with password missing uppercase letter
description: Verify that registration is rejected when password lacks an uppercase letter.

title: Register with password missing lowercase letter
description: Verify that registration is rejected when password lacks a lowercase letter.

title: Register with password missing digit
description: Verify that registration is rejected when password lacks a digit.

title: Register with password missing special character
description: Verify that registration is rejected when password lacks a special character.

title: Register with password containing spaces
description: Verify that registration is rejected when password contains spaces.

title: Register with password containing user's name
description: Verify that registration is rejected when password contains the user's name as personal information.

title: Account creation rate limit exceeded from same IP
description: Verify that after 5 failed registration attempts from the same IP within 15 minutes, the 6th attempt is blocked.

title: Account creation rate limit resets after 15 minutes
description: Verify that after the 15-minute rolling window expires, the IP can attempt registration again.

title: Concurrent registration requests from same IP
description: Verify that simultaneous registration requests from the same IP are handled correctly without creating duplicate accounts and rate limit is enforced consistently.

title: Verify email link expires after 24 hours
description: Verify that the verification link is valid for 24 hours and expires after that time, preventing verification after expiry.

title: Verify unique verification link per registration
description: Verify that each registration generates a unique verification link that is not reused across different accounts.

title: Verify verification link tampering is rejected
description: Verify that modifying the verification link token does not verify the account.

title: Resend verification email after 60 seconds cooldown
description: Verify that a resend request is allowed exactly 60 seconds after the previous request.

title: Resend verification email within 60 seconds cooldown
description: Verify that a resend request within 60 seconds is blocked.

title: Resend rate limit exceeded for account
description: Verify that after 3 resend requests within 1 hour for the same account, the resend feature is locked for 30 minutes.

title: Resend rate limit exceeded for IP
description: Verify that after 3 resend requests within 1 hour from the same IP, the resend feature is locked for 30 minutes for that IP.

title: Resend during 30-minute lockout period
description: Verify that attempting to resend during the 30-minute lockout period is blocked.

title: Login blocked for unverified account
description: Verify that an unverified account cannot log in.

title: Login allowed after email verification
description: Verify that after successful email verification, the account can log in successfully.

title: Expired verification link rejection
description: Verify that clicking an expired verification link (older than 24 hours) does not verify the account.

title: Request new verification link after expiry
description: Verify that after the verification link expires, the user can request a new verification link via resend.

title: Duplicate email error message
description: Verify that registering with an already used email returns the exact error message 'Email này đã được đăng ký. Vui lòng đăng nhập hoặc sử dụng email khác.'

title: Invalid password length error message
description: Verify that entering a password outside the 8-64 character range returns the exact error message 'Mật khẩu phải có độ dài từ 8 đến 64 ký tự.'

title: Invalid email format error message
description: Verify that entering an email with invalid format returns the exact error message 'Địa chỉ email không đúng định dạng. Vui lòng kiểm tra lại.'
